---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for BinIt
title: ''
labels: 'enhancement'
assignees: ''

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. (e.g., I'm always frustrated when [...])

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Additional context**
Add any other context, mockups, or references about the feature request here.

---

## Feature Category
Please select the category that best describes your feature:

- [ ] **User Interface** - Visual improvements, animations, theming
- [ ] **Core Functionality** - New thought processing features
- [ ] **PWA Features** - Offline capabilities, installability, notifications
- [ ] **Data Management** - Storage, retention, export/import
- [ ] **Social/Sharing** - Sharing thoughts or memories
- [ ] **Accessibility** - Keyboard navigation, screen reader support
- [ ] **Performance** - Speed improvements, resource optimization
- [ ] **Documentation** - Help files, tutorials, guides
- [ ] **Other** - Something not listed above

## Implementation Notes (Optional)
If you have technical ideas or implementation suggestions, please share them here:
